addOnPaste.description: Whether to add a tag when pasting into the input.

allowOverflow.description: Whether to allow tags to exceed max.

autoFocus.description: Whether to auto-focus the entry input.

blurBehavior.description: The blur behavior of the entry input.

defaultInputValue.description: The initial entry input value when uncontrolled.

defaultValue.description: The initial value of the tags input when uncontrolled.

delimiter.description: The delimiter character or regex used to add tags.

disabled.description: Whether the tags input is disabled.

editable.description: Whether tags are editable after creation.

form.description: The form attribute of the hidden input.

id.description: The id of the tags input.

ids.type:
Partial<{
  root: string
  input: string
  hiddenInput: string
  clearBtn: string
  label: string
  control: string
  item: (opts: tagsInput.ItemProps) => string
  itemDeleteTrigger: (opts: tagsInput.ItemProps) => string
  itemInput: (opts: tagsInput.ItemProps) => string
}>
ids.description: The element ids for the tags input parts.

inputValue.description: The controlled value of the entry input.

invalid.description: Whether the tags input is invalid.

maxLength.description: Max length of the entry input.

name.description: The name attribute of the hidden input.

placeholder.description: The placeholder text for the entry input.

readOnly.description: Whether the tags input is read-only.

required.description: Whether the tags input is required.

sanitizeValue.description: Function used to sanitize a tag value before adding.

translations.description: The translations for the tags input.

validate.description: Predicate used to determine whether a tag can be added.

value.description: The controlled value of the tags input as an array of tag strings.
The tags input primitive returned by useTagsInput().

index.description: Zero-based index of this tag item.

value.description: The value string of this tag item.
